description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named C/C++ CI that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a self-hosted job that checks out the repository, updates apt, installs required packages, installs cpp-coveralls with pip, and then runs a series of steps including autogen, configure, make, make check, and make distcheck. The workflow should also upload coverage data and a Linux 64-bit build artifact.
